content:
Words for Wednesday: Dream a New Dream

I think Lucky looks pretty pensive in this photo. That’s why I paired it with today’s C. S. Lewis quote! I often struggle with the thought that I’m too old to dream a new dream, and that things are just stuck the way they are. I need to get out of that mindset and focus on a new goal.

But for now, I must go take care of my Lucky Cat, who had oral surgery yesterday and is pretty doped up! Poor little guy. I’ll leave you to think about your dreams-to-be!

What new goals or dreams do you have?

featuredImage.alt: Words for Wednesday: "You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream." C. S. Lewis; http://www.katiecrafts.com
